text:
Connelly (コナリー, Konarī) is a lieutenant of the Xi-Yu Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 393 

Appearance

Connelly has a rectangular head, thick eyebrows, narrow eyes, prominent lips, and sleek, dark hair. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 378 He wears a light shirt and patterned tie as well as a pair of dark pants. 

Personality

Connelly is loyal to his mafia family and follows his orders. He is also willing to work with rival families if it means maintaining balance and order. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Somewhere aboard the Black Whale, Connelly is ordered by his superior Hinrigh to search the ship's passenger list for a man named Hisoka. He questions the need to search through larger families, and Hinrigh tells him Hisoka has likely taken precautions to avoid being found. To account for the possibility Hisoka is a stowaway, Hinrigh also orders Connelly to contact Queen Tang Zhao Li to request she has the army perform a round of passenger I.D. and ticket verifications. 

When a Kakin Royal Army corporal comes forward, offering information on the location of rogue mafia boss Morena, Connelly heads out to pay the corporal for the details. Upon arriving, he encounters Wang, underboss of the Cha-R Family, also seeking information. The Xi-Yu and Cha-R agree to go after Morena together, and Connelly accompanies a team to the supposed location of Morena's secret hideout.
